module.name: tree
module.description: Recursive hierarchy / tree-map. Each @tree is one node whose sections are its label then its children (a nested @tree per branch, plain text per leaf). Labels are full Markdown.
module.aiSpec:
Draw a HIERARCHY as nested boxes (a tree-map / containment diagram) — org charts, taxonomies, breakdowns. The module is RECURSIVE: one `@tree` block is ONE node. Split its body with `<!-- @ -->`: • the FIRST section is this node's LABEL, and • each following section is a CHILD — a nested `<!-- @tree -->…<!-- @end -->` for a branch (a child that itself has children), or plain text for a leaf. Because each label is a normal section, it renders with the FULL Markdown pipeline (**bold**, `code`, math \(x^2\), images, links, modules).
<!-- @tree layout: updown --> **Company** <!-- @ --> <!-- @tree --> Engineering <!-- @ --> Frontend <!-- @ --> Backend <!-- @end --> <!-- @ --> Design <!-- @end -->
Parameters (set per @tree node; children do NOT inherit them — repeat on each node for a uniform look): layout — how a node's children are arranged: `updown` (default) — a row of nested boxes beneath the label (containment); `right` — a stacked, indented column of boxes; `lines` — a classic ORG CHART: children below, joined to the parent by CONNECTOR LINES (no containing box). color — border / accent colour (default var(--accent-color)). fontSize — label font size, any CSS size (default 0.9em). gap — spacing between a node's children, CSS length (default 10px). radius — box corner radius, CSS length (default 8px). filled — tint the box background with the accent colour (default true; false = transparent box). Keep labels short and check the fit with measure_slides.
<!-- @tree layout: lines, color: #2563eb, radius: 4px --> **Company** <!-- @ --> <!-- @tree layout: lines --> Engineering <!-- @ --> Design <!-- @end --> <!-- @ --> Operations <!-- @end -->

param.name: layout
param.label: Children layout
param.desc: How this node's children are arranged.
param.options: updown:Row (nested boxes),right:Stacked (indented boxes),lines:Connected (org chart with lines)

param.name: color
param.label: Border / accent color
param.desc: Border and accent colour of this node's box.

param.name: fontSize
param.label: Label font size
param.desc: CSS size of the label text, e.g. 0.9em or 14px.

param.name: gap
param.label: Child gap
param.desc: Spacing between this node's children, CSS length, e.g. 10px.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: Box corner radius, CSS length, e.g. 8px.

param.name: filled
param.label: Filled background
param.desc: Tint the box with a faint accent fill (false = transparent box).

snippet.label: Tree — node with children
snippet.text: <!-- @tree layout: updown --> **Root** <!-- @ --> <!-- @tree --> Branch A <!-- @ --> Leaf 1 <!-- @ --> Leaf 2 <!-- @end --> <!-- @ --> Leaf B <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Recursive tree-map. First section = label; later sections = children (nested @tree = branch, plain text = leaf). Labels are Markdown.

snippet.label: Tree leaf (plain)
snippet.description: A single node (leaf). Use nested @tree sections to give it children.
